productDisplayName: Lotto Women Cara II W Red Flip Flops
description: lotto brings out this pair of flip flops for those who love the contemporary laidback lifestyle. These flip flops feature colourful branding on their comfy footbed with heavy duty straps. Wear this with denims rolled up at the cuffs and bright tees. Upper Rubber and fabric thong style straps with fabric toe separator Textured rubber footbed for instep comfort Floral print on the footbed Outsole TPU outsole with herringbone patterned grooves for grip and traction Flip flop care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
